title: The Earth Battery - How To Improve It - 1
description:
If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join.
Practical energy generation is always going to be a cost benefit exercise - here I am trying an improvement that would cost very little. The original video is at https://youtu.be/z_IerZ3JBys  .
